title: Rogues and Scoundrels

'''''Rogues and Scoundrels''''' was an expansion card pack made for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]] based on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' films and [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. The set was released on [[April 2]], [[2004]].<ref name="rel" />

Expansion contains 105 cards including 35 rare, 35 uncommon and 35 common cards.

It featured the first card to be banned from the game. The card, [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]], allowed a dark side player to win a large percentage of games in the first turn, and was deemed too powerful to be used in tournament play.<ref name="ban">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/tcg/news20040413.html|text=Ugnaught Banned from TCG}}</ref>

==Gameplay==
New Abilities:
*'''Bounty''': A reward given to the player when that unit defeats an enemy unit.
*'''Upkeep''': A continual payment that must if possible be paid to keep the unit in play.
